title: Animated Nicknames Lite
description: Like animations? Like cool nicknames? Like them free too? Then you'll love Animated Nicknames Lite!
body:
Like animations? Like cool nicknames? Like them free too?
Then you'll love Animated Nicknames Lite.

----------------------
After having sold Animated Nicknames for a while, I've decided to make a free Lite version with less features. If you like it, consider buying the full version to also unlock the paid features.
Click here to access the main plugin's page and buy it!
 -----------------------
Animated Nicknames is a plugin which adds style to your in-game name by adding nice animations both in the player list (tab) and above your head! Just look at this one:
And guess what, the menus are simple and easy to navigate! Just look at this!
-----------------

Features

Cool animated and coloured nicknames both in the player list and above your head!
The animated nicknames will only show above your head if enabled in the config.

Shadows under your name to make your animations (or just your name) stand out more!
Just open the shadows menu and let the colours speak to you!

Menus that are simple and easy to navigate!
Clicking through options has never been easier.

Preview your animations in the menu!
You can see them in advance, in case you don't want to show your friends an ugly one!
-------------------

Permissions

animatednicknames.open-menu
Allows users to open the menu through /animatednicknames menu.

animatednicknames.animations
Allows the user to have an animation

animatednicknames.animations.pick
Allows users to pick an animation.

animatednicknames.animations.pick-colour
Allows the user to pick a colour for their animation

animatednicknames.animations.pick-decoration
Allows the user to pick a decoration for their animation

animatednicknames.shadows
Allows the user to have a text shadow

animatednicknames.shadows.pick-colour
Allows the user to pick a colour for their text shadow

animatednicknames.nickname
Allows the user to set a nickname in tab and in nametag.

animatednicknames.reload-config
Allows users to reload the configuration.
------------

Installation

No Tab Plugin

1. Download the Jar.
2. Put it inside the plugins folder in your server's directory.
3. Start (or restart) the server.
4. Verify that Animated Nicknames is enabled and functional
5. Read the How-To section below

Using TAB

1. Download the Jar and TAB.
2. Put them inside the plugins folder in your server's directory.
3. Start (or restart) the server.
4. Verify that both plugins are enabled and functional.
5. Read the How-To section below

Using Velocitab

1. Download the Jar, Velocitab, PlaceholderAPI and PAPIProxyBridge
2. Put Animated Nicknames inside the plugins folder in your servers's directory (not the proxy) along with PlaceholderAPI and PAPIProxyBridge.
3. Copy PAPIProxyBridge and paste it into your proxy's plugins folder.
4. Make sure you are using the latest version of Velocity.
5. Start (or restart) your servers and proxy.
6. Enable using-proxy-tab in Animated Nicknames' config.
7. Change the papi_cache_time in Velocitab's config to 150.
8. Start (or restart) your servers and proxy again.
9. Read the How-To section below.
------------

How-To

1. Select an animation, colour and text decoration in the menu.
2. Go in the shadows menu and select a colour.
3. Enable your shadow.
4. Go back to the main menu.
5. Preview your animation and shadow to see if it fits your taste.
6. Enable your animation.
7. Enjoy the animation!
-------------

Note

This is a lite version, some buttons for some features are still present but will prompt you to buy the main plugin to unlock them.

Bug reports, feature requests and support is all handled at my Discord server.
Don't forget to follow the plugin so you don't miss any updates!
